title: ASH - Another Simple HUD
description: ASH - Another Simple HUD with FPS count, coordinates and compass
body:
# ASH - Another Simple HUD with FPS count, coordinates and compass.

![](https://imgur.com/i1OIOOT.png)

## Config Screen (with ModMenu)

![](https://i.imgur.com/2BJyejz.png)

## Commands
**/toggleash** - show/hide ASH

**/ashcolor r g b** - set text color (ex: /ashcolor 255 123 14)

**/togglefps** - show/hide fps

**/togglecoords** - show/hide coordinates

**/toggledirection** - show/hide direction facing

**/alignash left|center|right** - align ASH

**/resetash** - reset ASH settings

## My other mods
